title: Lighters
description: A cit resource pack to make flint and steel look like lighters when renamed.
body:
A cit resource pack to make flint and steel look like lighters when renamed. To do so, place a flint and steel inside the anvil menu, and rename it to [color] Lighter. Replace [color] with any of the colors listed below
- Yellow
- White
- Red
- Purple
- Pink
- Orange
- Magenta
- Lime
- Light Gray
- Light Blue
- Green
- Bray
- Cyan
- Brown
- Blue
- Black
